meaning: n.鎬荤粺,浼氶暱,鏍￠暱,琛岄暱
examples: He was sworn in as president.
His aim was to become president.
"This was an exciting day, " said Dan Mead, president and chief executive officer for Verizon Wireless.
Indeed, Saddam's sentencing was only a brief interruption in the president's final campaign swing.
